name: eventbrite-pp-mcp
description: Every Eventbrite organizer endpoint, plus a local SQLite mirror of your events, orders, and attendees you can search offline — the cross-event search Eventbrite removed, restored over your own data.

eventbrite_api_key.title: EVENTBRITE_API_KEY
eventbrite_api_key.description: Sets EVENTBRITE_API_KEY for the Eventbrite MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.eventbrite.com/platform/api-keys.
